steps.title: Draw the practical conclusion
steps.content: The word consequently signals that the blank must follow from the evidence. The passage says last-mile logistics remain a bottleneck because of rapid-delivery expectations, complex routes, and inefficient delivery paths. It also says new solutions such as autonomous robots are constrained by added complications, including slow travel around ground-level obstacles.

steps.title: Reject unsupported forecasts
steps.content: Choice A says robots can meet expectations now, but the passage says their success is constrained. Choice B says innovations will raise expectations, not address obstacles. Choice C gives an investment recommendation the text never makes. Choice D follows from the persistent bottleneck and constrained innovations: near-term success is unlikely. The answer is D.
